meaning: vt.閲嶆柊瀹氫箟vi.閲嶆柊瀹氫箟
examples: We need to redefine what we mean by democracy.
You just have to do a little thinking ahead and redefine what qualifies as dinner.
The task facing medicine in the twenty-first century will be to redefine its limits even as it extends its capacities.
The BlackBerry PlayBook delivers professional-grade, consumer-friendly experiences that redefine the possibilities of mobile computing.
This will help us redefine learning and repurpose the spaces we use for learning.
